conversation.content: Let's have a math class. Today we are going to learn about the form of multiplication of powers with the same base in exponential calculations in the world of Azeroth. It is different from conventional mathematical formulas in the real world and has a more fantasy flair.
My notebook is ready, let's begin.
In this world, the core formula specification for the multiplication of powers with the same base is: its form is aᵐ × aⁿ = aᵐ⁻ⁿ.
I have noted down this specification.
This formula can be used to solve for the product result when the base a and the exponents m, n are known.
Okay, I understand the application scenario of this specification.
